rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks for component ports must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Assumptions and guarantees for ports should reference visible feature names or declared constants
generic_rules: Use visible identifiers and named constants when defining range bounds in AGREE contracts
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions in AGREE contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Define range checks using boolean expressions like `x >= min and x <= max`
Place annex agree blocks in appropriate component type or implementation scopes based on scope requirements
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level port bindings in component type scopes
Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts
